description.s: Shared library for building hierarchical tag trees from flat tag lists

buildTagTree.name: buildTagTree
buildTagTree.description: Builds a hierarchical tree structure from a flat list of tag items

returns.description: Root nodes of the tree, each with a children array

getTagName.name: getTagName
getTagName.description: Gets display name for a tag node

getFullyQualifiedName.name: getFullyQualifiedName
getFullyQualifiedName.description: Gets fully-qualified tag name by walking up the parent chain

params.name: stopAtId
params.description: Optional ancestor ID to stop before (for relative paths)

getTagColor.name: getTagColor
getTagColor.description: Gets color for a tag node
